verdicts.description: Place the base on a flat surface in the standard orientation.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker places the white base plate on a flat surface in the standard orientation; part inspected for damage or warping.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker places the base flat in the standard orientation and visibly inspects it before proceeding at 00:00:10.

verdicts.description: Install the front chassis: align the front chassis braces to the front interface of the base and seat fully.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Front chassis fully seated on the base with no gap at the joint and bores aligned; squareness verified.
verdicts.reasoning: Front chassis fitted to the front interface and fully seated with no visible gap at 00:00:42; worker checks squareness.

verdicts.description: Install the front chassis pin: verify correct type and length (silver), insert through the aligned bores and push to a full seat with correct head orientation.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Correct silver pin fully seated through aligned bores with head orientation per the work instruction.
verdicts.reasoning: Pin is inserted to a full seat but the head is reversed relative to the work instruction. Reversed pin orientation is a documented error mode for this build that has previously escaped automated visual inspection.

verdicts.description: Front chassis verification: pin flush and fully engaged, front chassis cannot rotate or lift from the base, hands clear.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Front chassis secure with no rotation or lift; hands removed from the assembly for an unobstructed view (state 5).
verdicts.reasoning: Worker removes both hands and the front chassis is shown secure with no rotation or lift at 00:01:40.

verdicts.description: Install the rear chassis: align both LONG braces to the rear interface of the base and fit until bores align.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Two long white braces fitted parallel to the rear interface with bores concentric to the base bores.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker installs short braces (Procedure B upgrade stock) instead of the long braces required for a new build. Wrong-brace installation is a documented error mode; brace lengths were not compared side by side before fitting.

verdicts.description: Install the front-rear chassis pin: verify the pin, insert through the forward bore position of the rear chassis and push to a full seat.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Correct silver pin fully seated through the forward rear bore with correct orientation.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker verifies the pin and seats it fully through the forward bore with correct orientation at 00:02:58.

verdicts.description: Install the rear-rear chassis pin: verify the pin, insert through the rearmost bore position and push to a full seat.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Correct silver pin fully seated through the rearmost bore with correct orientation.
verdicts.reasoning: The rearmost bore is occluded by the worker's hand and the brace edge from the available camera angle. Full seat and head orientation cannot be confirmed.

verdicts.description: Rear chassis verification: both pins fully seated and correct, rear chassis secure with no play, braces parallel, hands clear.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Rear chassis secure with no play and braces parallel; hands removed for an unobstructed view (state 8).
verdicts.reasoning: Worker removes both hands; rear chassis shows no play and braces appear parallel at 00:03:40.
